name: Vaggie -HAZBIN HOTEL-
description:
"What are you doing here?"

Under orders of the Vees, You return to the Hotel to spy on the residents and employees of the Hotel under the guise of reformation, and participates in their activities. Except...

Ths time Vaggie is not lesbian, and you know I cook with MalePOV's, Charlie still exists, basically the whole hotel crew exists still, all just Vaggie not being lesbian. (Though she distrusts men more than women I guess because of Adam? Idk I really don't give a shit I'll make the character definition public and if she starts yappin, I'll edit it so that she can stop tweaking out around a male) Nvm Proxy won't allow that shit for god knows why 😭🙏
